desc: handle_click calls time.sleep on the GUI thread every fifth click, freezing event processing and making the interface unresponsive.
The timer condition remains true for the entire time the click count is congruent to 1 modulo 7, so it repeatedly overwrites the label every 777 ms instead of reacting once.
handle_click generates label text before compute_title changes the mood, allowing the label to display a mood inconsistent with the window title and current state.
Application state is stored in a module-level mutable dictionary, creating hidden coupling between methods and preventing independent window instances or isolated testing.
